title: Department Top Three Salaries
description: Giống LC184 nhưng trả mọi nhân viên thuộc top 3 mức lương cao nhất trong mỗi department (tie vẫn tính).
approach: DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY departmentId ORDER BY salary DESC) AS rk WHERE rk <= 3.
memoryTip: Top 3 salaries per dept = DENSE_RANK partition dept, filter rk<=3.

solutions.python:
# SQL
SELECT d.name AS Department, e.name AS Employee, e.salary AS Salary
FROM (
  SELECT *, DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY departmentId ORDER BY salary DESC) AS rk
  FROM Employee
) e
JOIN Department d ON e.departmentId = d.id
WHERE e.rk <= 3;

analysis.correctness: DENSE_RANK theo dept đếm hạng lương; rk<=3 giữ top 3 mức kể cả tie.
pitfalls: RANK() có thể >3 hạng khi tie
